query: I built a workflow that calls a flaky API and writes to Postgres. Is it production-ready?
expected_behavior: Requires an Error Workflow (n8n-nodes-base.errorTrigger) assigned in Workflow Settings
Requires retryOnFail + maxTries + waitBetweenTries on the network-I/O node
Requires idempotent writes (upsert / dedupe key) for the Postgres write
Runs the production-checklist as a real gate, not a suggestion
Does NOT declare it production-ready without these
